name: Dark World Puppetry
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>暗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>傀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>儡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target up to 3 cards in any GY(s); banish them, then discard 1 Fiend monster. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 of your banished Fiend monsters; add it to your hand. You can only activate 1 "Dark World Puppetry" per turn.
eff: Target up to 3 cards in any GY(s); banish them, then discard 1 Fiend monster. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 of your banished Fiend monsters; add it to your hand. You can only activate 1 "Dark World Puppetry" per turn.

action: Adds banished cards to the hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
